CancellablePromise  CancellablePromise InitializerCancellablePromiseCKTool JS 1.2.15+new inner(
	Promise inner,
	Function? cancel
); Parameters inner

The optional function you can use to cancel the promise.

A function that takes no parameters that CancellablePromise uses to cancel the inner promise. If you provide this function, it must eventually throw CancelledError.

-  CancellablePromise 

Initializer# CancellablePromise

CKTool JS 1.2.15+

```
new inner(
	Promise inner,
	Function? cancel
);
```

## [ Parameters ](/documentation/cktooljs/cancellablepromise/cancellablepromise#parameters)

`inner`

`cancel`The optional function you can use to cancel the promise.

A function that takes no parameters that `CancellablePromise` uses to cancel the inner promise. If you provide this function, it must eventually throw `CancelledError`.
